# komodo_provider_account (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo git provider account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_provider_account" "example" {
  id = "6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The git provider account identifier (ObjectId).

### Read-Only

- `domain` (String) The git provider domain without protocol prefix (e.g. `github.com`).
- `https_enabled` (Boolean) Whether HTTPS is used for cloning.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The plaintext access token for the account.
- `username` (String) The account username.
